description.en: A string representing the drive letter or name, if any: >>> PureWindowsPath('c:/Program Files/').drive 'c:' >>> PureWindowsPath('/Program Files/').drive '' >>> PurePosixPath('/etc').drive '' UNC shares are also considered drives: >>> PureWindowsPath('//host/share/foo.txt').drive '\\\\host\\share'

excerpt.es: A string representing the drive letter or name, if any: >>> PureWindowsPath('c:/Program Files/').drive 'c:' >>> PureWindowsPath('/Program Files/').drive '' >>> PurePosixPath('/etc').drive '' UNC share...
